blockers: OPscinema: macOS Screen Recording permission is still missing for com.opscinema.desktop, so the packaged-app happy path cannot complete until Privacy & Security access is granted.
done_definition: OPscinema is granted Screen Recording permission for com.opscinema.desktop and then passes the packaged-app smoke checklist end to end.
The other six batch-10 projects remain complete on the audited surfaces unless new drift appears.
The markdown and JSON batch-10 records stay aligned with the verified state.
